label: Graph Integrity

deductions.evidence: Slugs: revision-arthroplasty, periprosthetic-joint-infection, hip-prosthetic-joint-infection, knee-prosthetic-joint-infection, knee-osteoarthritis, bearing-surface-selection, adverse-local-tissue-reaction, unicompartmental-knee-arthroplasty, polyethylene-wear-osteolysis, total-knee-arthroplasty, hip-abductor-mechanics, kellgren-lawrence-hip, calcar, femoral-neck, greater-trochanter, hip-joint, intertrochanteric-region, lesser-trochanter, medial-femoral-circumflex-artery, proximal-femur-anatomy-hub, sciatic-nerve, compartment-syndrome, distal-femur-fracture, femoral-shaft-fracture, tibial-shaft-fracture
deductions.reason: Orphan entities cannot be traversed by products and indicate incomplete graph wiring.
deductions.suggestedFix: Add inbound or outbound clinical/anatomy edges, or merge duplicates.

deductions.evidence: acetabulum -[part_of]-> pelvis; adult-reconstruction-anatomy-hub -[prerequisite_for]-> hip-osteoarthritis; collateral-ligaments -[part_of]-> adult-reconstruction-anatomy-hub
deductions.reason: Relationships must resolve to entities in the neighborhood graph.
deductions.suggestedFix: Create missing entities or remove invalid relationship proposals.

deductions.evidence: Disconnected: calcar, femoral-neck, greater-trochanter, hip-joint, intertrochanteric-region, lesser-trochanter, medial-femoral-circumflex-artery, proximal-femur-anatomy-hub, sciatic-nerve
deductions.reason: Anatomy must connect to the condition graph for educational traversal.
deductions.suggestedFix: Add involves_anatomy, injured_in, or part_of edges from condition/procedure anchors.

deductions.evidence: conflict-report.json: Duplicate claim text: claim-hip-osteoarthritis-core vs claim-hip-osteoarthritis-imaging_point-hip-oa-is-a-clinical-plu
deductions.reason: Unresolved merge conflicts indicate inconsistent agent outputs.
deductions.suggestedFix: Run conflict-resolver agent and reconcile metadata/text conflicts.

recommendations: Add inbound or outbound clinical/anatomy edges, or merge duplicates.
Create missing entities or remove invalid relationship proposals.
Add involves_anatomy, injured_in, or part_of edges from condition/procedure anchors.
Run conflict-resolver agent and reconcile metadata/text conflicts.
